name: OpenX
notes:
Latency is critical for OpenX. OpenX peers to help speed ad delivery and real time bidding performance in a number of sites throughout the world. If you are interested in peering as an option to improve the speed of server-side real-time bidding, please let your account manager know and we will begin the process of analyzing whether peering could be an effective solution to reduce network latency between us.

Our general policy is to peer selectively with specific business partners, unless the volume of traffic for a specific ASN indicates a mutual benefit to peering. If you believe the traffic between our networks fits that description, please send an email to peering@openx.com and include the exchange(s) you wish to peer at, your ASN, your peering address information, and an analysis which shows the volume of traffic (e.g. netflow data).
